title: Translalia Environment Schema
description: Current-code-first environment and config surface for the Translalia workspace.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Required OpenAI API key used by translation, notebook, journey, and verification routes.

DEEPSEEK_API_KEY.description: Optional DeepSeek API key. Required only when a deepseek-* model is selected on the Method 2 chat-completions path (provider-routed via getClientForModel in src/lib/ai/openai.ts; base URL https://api.deepseek.com). Unused for OpenAI-only deployments.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL.description: Required Supabase project URL used by browser, server, auth, and middleware code.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.description: Required Supabase anon key used by browser, server, auth, and middleware code.

UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL.description: Optional Redis REST URL. Required when production queue/lock features rely on Redis.

UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN.description: Optional Redis REST token paired with UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL.

SENTRY_DSN.description: Optional Sentry DSN used by verification error reporting.

NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURE_ENHANCER.description: Set to "1" to enable enhancer-related UI or route behavior.

NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURE_TRANSLATOR.description: Set to "1" to enable translator-facing UI or route behavior.

NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURE_SIDEBAR_LAYOUT.description: Set to "1" to enable the sidebar-layout variant.

NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURE_VERIFICATION_INTERNA.description: Set to "true" to enable Track A verification.

NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURE_VERIFICATION_CONTEXT.description: Set to "true" to enable Track B context-note generation.

USE_SIMPLIFIED_PROMPTS.description: Set to "1" to use the simplified prompt path documented in ADR 0002.

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.description: Base URL used by routes that call back into the app.

USE_REDIS_LOCK.description: When "true", Redis locking is required and missing Redis becomes a hard failure.

SUGGESTIONS_RATE_LIMIT.description: Numeric per-day limit for suggestion routes.

VERIFICATION_RATE_LIMIT.description: Numeric per-day limit for verification grading.

CONTEXT_RATE_LIMIT.description: Numeric per-day limit for context-note generation.

WORKSHOP_RETRY_LINE_RATE_LIMIT.description: Numeric per-day limit for workshop retry-line requests.

NOTEBOOK_POEM_SUGGESTIONS_RATE_LIMIT.description: Numeric per-day limit for notebook whole-poem suggestions.

NOTEBOOK_PRISMATIC_RATE_LIMIT.description: Numeric per-day limit for notebook prismatic generation.

JOURNEY_GENERATE_REFLECTION_RATE_LIMIT.description: Numeric per-day limit for journey reflection generation.

JOURNEY_GENERATE_BRIEF_FEEDBACK_RATE_LIM.description: Numeric per-day limit for journey brief-feedback generation.

TRANSLATION_STATUS_TIMEOUT_MS.description: HTTP timeout budget for translation-status polling.

TICK_TIME_BUDGET_MS.description: Translation tick budget in milliseconds passed from translation-status to runTranslationTick.

ENABLE_STATUS_READ_ADVANCE_SPLIT.description: When "1", translation-status ignores the advance query param and serves read-only responses.

ENABLE_WORKER_ACTIVE_SET_GC.description: Set to "0" to disable translation-worker startup cleanup and periodic active-set GC.

WORKER_STALE_THRESHOLD_MS.description: Age threshold in milliseconds for translation-worker active-set GC.

TRANSLATION_MAX_QUEUE_DEPTH.description: Maximum jobs admitted to the translation queue before enqueue requests are rejected.

MAX_POEM_LINES_FOR_TRANSLATION.description: Maximum poem line count accepted by initialize-translations.

ENABLE_SCALABILITY_METRICS.description: Set to "1" to enable aggregated scalability telemetry collection.

METRICS_FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS.description: Telemetry batch flush interval in milliseconds.

METRICS_SAMPLE_RATE.description: Sampling rate for high-cardinality telemetry events.

ENABLE_PARALLEL_STANZAS.description: Kill switch for parallel stanza processing.

MAX_STANZAS_PER_TICK.description: Maximum stanzas/chunks per translation tick (capped at 5 in code).

CHUNK_CONCURRENCY.description: Chunk/stanza concurrency limit (capped at 5 in code).

MAIN_GEN_PARALLEL_LINES.description: Enable per-line parallelism within a stanza.

MAIN_GEN_LINE_CONCURRENCY.description: Per-stanza line concurrency cap (capped at 8 in code).

MAX_REGEN_TIME_MS.description: Maximum regen time per line in milliseconds.

GPT5_REGEN_CONCURRENCY.description: Concurrency cap for GPT-5 regen requests.

DEFAULT_REGEN_CONCURRENCY.description: Concurrency cap for non-GPT-5 regen requests.

MAIN_GEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS.description: Output token cap for main generation (minimum 300 in code).

REGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS.description: Output token cap for regeneration (minimum 200 in code).

ENABLE_STRICT_JSON_SCHEMA.description: Enable strict JSON schema for models that support it.

STRICT_JSON_SCHEMA_MODELS.description: Comma-separated model prefixes allowed to use strict schema.

STRICT_SCHEMA_FALLBACK_TO_JSON_OBJECT.description: Fallback to json_object if strict schema is unsupported.

ENABLE_LOCAL_ANCHOR_REALIZATIONS.description: Compute anchor realizations locally instead of asking the model.

ALLOW_STOPWORD_ONLY_ANCHORS.description: Allow stopword-only anchors for allowlisted anchor ids.

STOPWORD_ALLOWED_ANCHORS.description: Comma-separated allowlist of anchor ids for stopword-only realization.

ENABLE_STOP_SEQUENCES.description: Enable stop sequences for completion cleanup.

OMIT_SUBJECT_FORM_FROM_PROMPT.description: Remove subject-form field from prompt/schema and compute it locally.

FIDELITY_GATE_BLOCKING.description: If enabled, fidelity-gate failures can block output instead of only logging.

LOG_CONTEXT_GENERATION.description: Enable additional logging for context-note generation.

DEBUG_API_ENABLED.description: Set to "1" to enable authenticated debug endpoints outside local development.

DEBUG_ANCHOR_REALIZATIONS.description: Log local vs model anchor realizations.

DEBUG_INVARIANTS.description: Log invariant checks in translation job orchestration.

DEBUG_LOCK.description: Log Redis and in-memory lock behavior.

DEBUG_MONOTONICITY.description: Log monotonicity checks in job-state updates.

DEBUG_OAI_RAW_OUTPUT.description: Log raw OpenAI output on failure paths.

DEBUG_OUTPUT_MAX_CHARS.description: Maximum characters to include in raw-output logs.

DEBUG_OUTPUT_ON_PARSE_FAIL.description: Log raw output when parsing fails.

DEBUG_RAW_COMPLETION.description: Log raw completion text before parsing.

DEBUG_RETRY.description: Log retry layers across the pipeline.

DEBUG_VARIANTS.description: Log variant generation and recipe-cache behavior.

TEST_THREAD_ID.description: Test-only thread id used by concurrent audit testing helpers.
